notes: Authenticated organization checks used the existing signed-in in-app browser session for GreenGrid Energy and were read-only.
No forms were submitted, no collaborator invites were sent, no credentials were entered, and no destructive/admin actions were attempted.

Full credentialed account creation, payment/billing if any, and email-link acceptance with real tokens were not manually executed because they would create or transmit data; production smoke/e2e evidence covers the strict authenticated corridor.
